audit_rows.detail: no future-only fields inside feature set
regime and event fields are derived from same-day board state and registry rows with public_release_time <= trade_date by construction
forward_return_10 / max_favorable_return_10 / max_adverse_return_10 are kept outside the feature set and only supervise offline labels
all rows have point-in-time trade_date keys

interpretation: V1.25Q performs a hard field-level leakage audit before any supervised learning claim is trusted.
The key rule is simple: structure/event features must stay contemporaneous, and all future path quantities must remain label-only.
